scripts.preinstall: node -e "if (!/pnpm/.test(process.env.npm_execpath || '')) { console.error('This repository requires pnpm. Run: corepack enable && pnpm install'); process.exit(1); }"
scripts.build: pnpm --filter rd-git run build && pnpm --filter @rd-git/shared run build && pnpm --filter @rd-git/web run build
